features: Portable and Lightweight ------ Sleek, compact design with non-slip rubber. This wireless charging pad takes up very little space and can be easily carried during travel or business. Looks great wherever you use the wireless charging disk.

Qi Fast Wireless Charging Mat ------ This Qi fast contact charger allows you to charge your device at a higher charging speed up to 1.4x faster than a standard wireless charging base. Please use a QC adapter with a power of not less than 10W to charge. [Adapter not included in this version]. WARM NOTICE: Please do not charge when the ambient temperature is too high.

Extensive Compatibility ------ 10W fast wireless charging pad for Samsung Galaxy S25/S25+ /S25 Ultra/S24/S24 FE/S24+/S24 Ultra/S23/S23+/S23 Ultra/S22/S21/S20/S10/S9/S8. 7.5W fast wireless charging base for iPhone Air/17 Pro Max/17 Pro/17/16 Pro Max/16 Pro/16 Plus/16/15 Pro Max/15 Pro/15 Plus/15/14/13/12/SE 2020/11/X/XS/XR. (Please note: Wireless charging speeds may be slower than wired charging. Please verify whether your device supports the Qi wireless charging standard before placing your order.)

Intelligent Design ------ Exclusive multi-function intelligent protection technology, providing temperature control, surge protection, and short circuit protection. The smart LED indicator lights up for 10 seconds while charging, then turns off during charging, with no lights to disturb your sweet sleep. Induction charging your phone directly through a protective case up to 5mm thick. (Cases with magnetic and metal attachments are not included.)

What You Got ------ 1 x Qi Cordless Charging Pad, 1 x 3ft Charging Cable, 1 x User Manual, a worry-free buying experience. Any questions during use, please contact us first through your order, our friendly customer service professionals will resolve them for you right away.
An ideal mothers day gift, Spring present, fathers day gift, Christmas gift, Secret Santa present, New Year gift, or birthday present for men or women, your family, friends, and someone you love.
description: Product Description NANAMI Fast Wireless Charger Pad, enjoy the faster wireless charging life. Just set your mobile phone down on the pad. Say goodbye to tangled wires and lost charging cables. Superb Customer Experience We strive to push the boundaries of design and technology. Our products are crafted and articulated with a mindset on maintaining the highest quality standards for the ultimate experience. Any questions or problems during use, please feel free to send us an email via Amazon, we will solve them for you right away. NANAMI Wireless Charging Pad 3 Charging Modes 10W Quick charging model: Samsung Galaxy S25/S25+/S25 Ultra/S24 Ultra/S24+/S24/S23 Ultra/ S23+/S23/S22 Ultra/S22/S22+/S21/S21 Plus/S21 FE/S21 Ultra/S20/S20 Plus/S20 Ultra/S20 FE/S10/S10 Plus/S10E/S9/S9 Plus/S8/S8 Plus/Note 20/Note 10 7.5W Fast charging model: iPhone Air/17 Pro Max/17 Pro/17/16/16 Plus/16 Pro/16 Pro Max/15/15 Plus/15 Pro/15 Pro Max/14/14 Plus/14 Pro/14 ProMax/13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/13 Mini/12/12 Pro/12 Pro Max/12 Mini/SE 2/11/11 Pro/11 Pro Max/X/XS/XR/XS Max/8/8 Plus 5W Standard charging model for Other Qi-compatible models Universal, high speed, Non-slip design Advanced security technology LED display shows charging status Farewell to cable salad & defective charging cables Superior Safety Protection Work flawlessly with any Qi-compatible phone, ensuring a ultimate safe charge for you and your devices. Sleep Friendly No more tangled-up wires, beeping sounds, and annoying lights! Its LED indicator will automatically shut off after 10 seconds for your sweet sleep. Easy to Carry Sleek, thin, and convenient to carry. A good companion for travel and business trip. Looks great and stylish wherever you use it. Phone Case Friendly Supports most phone cases thickness less than 0.2in such as armor case, rubber case, hybrid case, plastic/TPU/PC cases.
